CASE SETTLED BY STIP- ULATION W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 140 JONES ST, #412, S.F, CA. - WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 3-15-94, 5PM - ALL RENT & DAMAGES WVD. IF DEFS. VACATE BY 3-15-94 - IF DEFS. DON'T VACATE $1,952.94 RENT & DAMAGES WILL BE PART OF JUDGMENT - MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS - ANY PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED - DEFS. WARRANT THEY ARE SOLE OCCUPANTS OF PREMISES. PL. ATTY TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JAMES, MARSHALL RAMSEY, ROSA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 140 JONES ST, #412, S.F, CA. $1,872.94 RENT, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,952.94, STAYED UNTIL MAR-15-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS. ALL RENT & DAMAGES WVD. IF DEF. VACATES BY 3-15-94. ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED. DEF. WARRANTS THEY ARE SOLE OCCUPANTS.
